arxiv_papers.title: Dynamic resource coordination can increase grid hosting capacity to support more renewables, storage, and electrified load growth
arxiv_papers.snippet: We show that dynamic coordination of distributed energy resources (DERs) can increase the capacity of low- and medium-voltage grids, improve reliability and power quality, and reduce solar curtailment.
